description.en: Complete guide to concrete anchors. Learn about wedge anchors, sleeve anchors, drop-in anchors, and how to select the right anchor for your application.
description.zh: 混凝土锚栓完整指南。了解楔形锚栓、套筒锚栓、膨胀螺栓以及如何为您的应用选择正确的锚栓。
description.es: Guía completa de anclajes para hormigón. Aprenda sobre anclajes de cuña, manguito, colapsables y cómo seleccionar el anclaje correcto.
description.ar: دليل شامل لمرساة الخرسانة. تعلم عن مراسي الإسفين ومراسي الأكمام ومراسي السقوط واختيار المرساة الصحيحة.
description.fr: Guide complet des ancrages pour béton. Apprenez les ancrages à coin, à manchon, à chute et comment sélectionner le bon ancrage.
description.pt: Guia completo de ancoragens para concreto. Aprenda sobre ancoragens de cunha, luva, gotejamento e como selecionar a âncora certa.
description.ru: Полное руководство по анкерам для бетона. Узнайте о клиновых анкерах, гильзовых анкерах, врезных анкерах и как выбрать правильный.
description.ja: コンクリートアンカーの完全ガイド。ウェッジアンカー、スリーブアンカー、ドロップインアンカー、および適切なアンカーの選択方法について学びます。
description.de: Vollständiger Leitfaden für Betonanker. Erfahren Sie mehr über Keil-, Hülsen- und Einsteckanker.
description.hi: कंक्रीट एंकरों की पूर्ण गाइड। वेज एंकर, स्लीव एंकर, ड्रॉप-इन एंकर, और अपने अनुप्रयोग के लिए सही एंकर कैसे चुनें।

keywords: concrete anchors, wedge anchors, sleeve anchors, drop-in anchors, anchor bolts, expansion anchors

body.en:
Different anchor types for different applications:

1. Wedge Anchors:
- Full expansion against concrete
- Highest load capacity
- Not removable
- Use: Structural connections

2. Sleeve Anchors:
- Multi-piece expansion
- Good for hollow masonry
- Moderate load capacity
- Use: General purpose

3. Drop-in Anchors:
- Internally threaded
- Flush mount installation
- Requires setting tool
- Use: Repetitive attachments

4. Strike Anchors:
- Nail-style installation
- Quick installation
- Light-duty only
- Use: Temporary installations

Key factors for anchor selection:

1. Load Requirements:
- Determine design load (tension and shear)
- Check anchor load tables
- Apply safety factors

2. Base Material:
- Solid concrete: All anchor types work
- Hollow masonry: Sleeve anchors
- Cracked concrete: Use ICC-approved anchors

3. Installation Type:
- Fixed object: Wedge or sleeve anchor
- Temporary: Strike anchor
- Repetitive: Drop-in anchor

4. Environment:
- Dry interior: Carbon steel
- Exterior: Hot-dip galvanized
- Corrosive: Stainless steel

Proper installation ensures anchor performance:

1. Hole Preparation:
- Drill to correct diameter
- Drill depth = anchor depth + 1/4"
- Clean hole thoroughly (blow and brush)

2. Installation:
- Wedge anchor: Hammer in, tighten nut
- Sleeve anchor: Insert and tighten
- Drop-in: Set with setting tool

3. Minimum Spacing:
- 10 x diameter from edges
- 12 x diameter between anchors
- From cracks: 6 x diameter minimum

4. Edge Distance:
- Maintain minimum edge distance
- Reduces splitting risk
- Ensures full load capacity

cta.ja: アンカー見積もりを依頼
